implementation.approach: discovery hosting controls, rate limits, moderation (bans), abuse reporting, and operator-visible audit records

discovery_hosting_controls.connection_limits: libp2p::connection_limits::Behaviour in Behaviour struct with configurable max_established_incoming, max_established_per_peer, max_pending_incoming via env vars
discovery_hosting_controls.kademlia_bounds: explicit MemoryStoreConfig with max_records=100, max_provided_keys=10, max_providers_per_key=20, max_value_bytes=65536
discovery_hosting_controls.dht_hosting_toggle: DLLMD_P2P_DHT_HOSTING env var controls kad::Mode::Server vs Client, independent of DiscoveryMode
discovery_hosting_controls.feature_flag: added memory-connection-limits to libp2p features in dllm-transport/Cargo.toml

rate_limits.connect_info: into_make_service_with_connect_info::<SocketAddr>() in both TLS (axum_server) and non-TLS (axum::serve) paths
rate_limits.rate_limiter: crates/dllm-daemon/src/rate_limit.rs — generic per-key sliding window RateLimiter following BudgetEnforcer pattern
rate_limits.ip_rate_limit: middleware on POST /v1/access-requests keyed by source IP; configurable via DLLMD_ACCESS_REQUEST_RATE_LIMIT (default 10) and DLLMD_ACCESS_REQUEST_RATE_WINDOW (default 60s)
rate_limits.pubkey_cooldown: submit_access_request checks for existing pending request (existing AccessRequestAlreadyPending guard)

moderation.data_model: MembershipBan { node_pubkey, banned_at_unix, reason } on NetworkState with #[serde(default, skip_serializing_if = "Vec::is_empty")]
moderation.validate_state: BanTargetIsMember when ban overlaps active member or owner
moderation.ban_check_http: submit_access_request checks banned list before queuing; returns NodeIsBanned(reason)
moderation.ban_check_libp2p: AuthView::authorize() checks banned list after membership validation; returns AuthError::Banned

abuse_reporting.data_model: AbuseReport { reporter_pubkey, subject_pubkey, category, note, reported_at_unix }
abuse_reporting.storage: unsigned local queue in PersistedState and NetworkStore, matching pending_access_requests pattern
abuse_reporting.validation: submit_abuse_report checks reporter is a known member (AbuseReportNotMember)

audit_records.concurrency: mpsc::UnboundedSender to dedicated tokio::spawn writer task; best-effort, drops on failure
audit_records.coverage: access request submit/approve/deny, budget set/remove, member revoke, forwarding policy set/remove, transport bind/revoke, model assign/unassign, placement drain/resume, owner transfer, ban/unban, abuse report submit, rate-limit rejections

files_changed.crates/dllm-protocol/src/lib.rs: MembershipBan, AbuseReport structs; banned field on NetworkState; BanTargetIsMember StateError; validate_state ban check; 5 new tests
files_changed.crates/dllm-daemon/src/lib.rs: 4 new StoreError variants; abuse_reports on PersistedState and NetworkStore; ban_node, unban_node, submit_abuse_report, list_abuse_reports, clear_abuse_report methods; ban check and queue cap in submit_access_request; create/load/load_replica/save updated for abuse_reports
files_changed.crates/dllm-daemon/src/rate_limit.rs: NEW FILE — generic per-key sliding-window RateLimiter; 4 tests
files_changed.crates/dllm-daemon/src/audit.rs: NEW FILE — append-only JSONL audit log with rotation and mpsc-based async writer; 3 tests
files_changed.crates/dllm-daemon/src/api.rs: RateLimiter, AuditLog fields on ApiState; BanNodeRequest, UnbanNodeRequest, SubmitAbuseReportRequest, AuditLogQuery types; rate-limit middleware; ban_node, unban_node, submit_abuse_report, list_abuse_reports, audit_log handlers; new routes on admin and viewer routers
files_changed.crates/dllm-daemon/src/main.rs: into_make_service_with_connect_info in both TLS and non-TLS paths; RateLimiter, RateLimitConfig, AuditLog construction; new PeerNodeConfig fields (dht_hosting, connection limits); DLLMD_ACCESS_REQUEST_RATE_LIMIT/WINDOW env vars
files_changed.crates/dllm-transport/src/peer.rs: connection_limits::Behaviour in Behaviour struct; PeerNodeConfig fields for dht_hosting, connection limits, relay rate limiters; MemoryStoreConfig for Kademlia; conditional kad::Mode; 12 test PeerNodeConfig sites updated
files_changed.crates/dllm-transport/src/auth.rs: AuthError::Banned variant; ban-list check in authorize(); banned: vec![] in test helper
files_changed.crates/dllm-cli/src/main.rs: BanNode, UnbanNode, ReportAbuse, ListAbuseReports, AuditLog subcommands
files_changed.crates/dllm-daemon/tests/lifecycle_tests: rate_limiter, access_request_rate_config, audit_log fields on test ApiState

new_tests.name: ban_non_member_accepted
new_tests.assertions: Ban of stranger is accepted; roundtrips through sign/verify

new_tests.name: admits_up_to_max_requests
new_tests.assertions: Up to max_requests admitted; next fails

new_tests.name: isolated_keys
new_tests.assertions: Key A exhaustion does not affect Key B

new_tests.name: log_writes_entries
new_tests.assertions: Two entries written; both deserialize with correct fields

new_tests.name: rotation_creates_new_file
new_tests.assertions: Small max_bytes triggers rotation to audit.1.jsonl

new_tests.name: dropped_sender_does_not_panic
new_tests.assertions: Log call with no receiver does not panic

independence_invariants.connection_limits_not_authorization: connection_limits::Behaviour is local resource protection configured via env vars, not owner-signed state. Passing it is necessary but not sufficient.
independence_invariants.ban_does_not_implicitly_revoke: validate_state rejects BanTargetIsMember; revoke_member must be called first
independence_invariants.ban_does_not_touch_budget_or_forwarding: ban_node/unban_node only mutate the banned Vec; ResourceBudget and ForwardingPolicy are untouched
independence_invariants.audit_is_observational: audit log uses best-effort mpsc; failures drop entries silently and never block or roll back mutations
independence_invariants.abuse_reports_not_authoritative: unsigned local queue, same pattern as pending_access_requests
independence_invariants.rate_limits_are_resource_protection: rate limits are a local daemon gate, not a membership decision
